title: Dyckia schreiteri
taxonomy: Dyckia schreiteri is a species of bromeliad in the family Bromeliaceae. It is native to Argentina. The plant is classified within the genus Dyckia, which comprises approximately 100 species of terrestrial bromeliads. The Dyckia genus is further classified under the subfamily Tillandsioideae and the family Bromeliaceae. Dyckia schreiteri is a relatively rare species within the Dyckia genus.
